title: Daoist Canon: Lu Xixing: Fangwailei (Section 2)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Lu Xixing: Fangwailei
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Lu Xixing: Fangwailei

translation.text: From the Lu Xixing: Fangwailei of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
